---
title: "Datasets"
---

### U.S. House

| Congress | Download |
|----------|----------|
| 114th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_house114.csv) |
| 115th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_house115.csv) |
| 116th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_house116.csv) |
| 117th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_house117.csv) |
| 118th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_house118.csv) |

### U.S. Senate

| Congress | Download |
|----------|----------|
| 114th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_senate114.csv) |
| 115th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_senate115.csv) |
| 116th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_senate116.csv) |
| 117th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_senate117.csv) |
| 118th Congress | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_senate118.csv) |


---

**Citation:** Gaynor, S.W. and Goel, P. "Text-based ideal points for the U.S. Congress", 2026. [sorellewg.github.io/TBIP](https://sorellewg.github.io/TBIP)
